title: Gusto vs ClickUp
description: Compare Gusto vs ClickUp — a hr & people platform versus a project management solution. Find out which tool better suits your workflow.
verdict: Gusto (HR & People) and ClickUp (Project Management) serve different primary purposes. Gusto has a higher user rating, but the right choice depends on whether your priority is hr & people or project management capabilities.

faqs.question: What is the difference between Gusto and ClickUp?
faqs.answer: Gusto is a hr & people tool, while ClickUp is a project management platform. They serve different primary functions but may overlap in certain areas.

faqs.question: Can Gusto replace ClickUp?
faqs.answer: Not directly — they serve different categories. Some organizations use both for different purposes.

faqs.question: Which has better value, Gusto or ClickUp?
faqs.answer: Gusto ($40/mo + $6/person) and ClickUp (Free–$19/user/mo) have different pricing. Evaluate based on which category matters more for your workflows.
